title: refactor: store base_url as url::Url instead of String
description:
## Problem
JmapChatClient::new validates base_url as a url::Url but then stores it as a String. The type system doesn't capture the invariant, so fetch_session defensively calls trim_end_matches('/') again (client.rs:104). The url crate is already a dependency.

## Solution
Store base_url as url::Url on JmapChatClient. Derive the string form when building request URLs. Remove the redundant defensive trim in fetch_session.

## Acceptance
- JmapChatClient.base_url field is url::Url (or private with accessor)
- fetch_session no longer needs trim_end_matches
- All existing tests pass
